sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐνεργέω

- Transliteration: Energeo

- Phonetic: en-erg-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to be operative, be at work, put forth power

a. to work for one, aid one

2. to effect

3. to display one's activity, show one's self operative

- Origin: from G1756

- TDNT entry: 12:52,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1756; to be active efficient: - do (be) effectual (fervent) be mighty in shew forth self work (effectually in).
